mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service_task (id, customer_id, agent_id, request_source, status, priority, category, summary, ai_suggestion, assigned_to, unread_count, level, workflow_code, current_stage_code, current_stage_order, source_task_id, intent_code, route_reason, handoff_confidence, tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{customerId}, #{agentId}, #{requestSource}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{category}, #{summary}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{assignedTo}, #{unreadCount}, #{level}, #{workflowCode}, #{currentStageCode}, #{currentStageOrder}, #{sourceTaskId}, #{intentCode}, #{routeReason}, #{handoffConfidence}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE service_task SET summary = #{summary}, ai_suggestion= #{aiSuggestion}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, category = #{category}, assigned_to = #{assignedTo}, unread_count = #{unreadCount}, level = #{level}, workflow_code = #{workflowCode}, current_stage_code = #{currentStageCode}, current_stage_order = #{currentStageOrder}, source_task_id = #{sourceTaskId}, intent_code = #{intentCode}, route_reason = #{routeReason}, handoff_confidence = #{handoffConfidence}, tags = #{tags, typeHandler=com.icss.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
